subcodes.first_line: O Father! The Most Exalted Pen proclaimeth: Ponder thou upon the state of the Son, and with manifest vision fix thy gaze upon the Most Great Scene [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پدر قلم اعلی میفرماید در حال پسر فکر کن و ببصر اظهر بمنظر اکبر ناظر باش آخر هر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation
